entry.note: <L>5841<pc>1-0426<k1>arcya<k2>arcya {#arcya#}¦ (wie eben) <lex>adj.</lex> <ls>VOP. 26,17.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 26,">18.</ls> {%zu verehren, verehrungswürdig%} <ls>H. 446.</ls> {#arcyo naH puruzopahArabaliBirdevo mahABEravaH#} <ls>PRAB. 54,4.</ls> {#tvayA mama ca kfzRo 'rcyaH#} <ls>VOP. 5,10.</ls> {#arcayizye 'hamarcyaM tvAm#} <ls>MBH. 1,3203.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 2,10.</ls> <ls>BHAṬṬ. 6,70.</ls> <LEND>
